name: System Audio Recorder
command:
#!/bin/bash
# Find meetings DB dynamically
MEETINGS_DB=$(for db in ~/Papr/jobs/*/data/data.db; do sqlite3 "$db" "SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE name='meetings'" 2>/dev/null | grep -q meetings && echo "$db" && break; done)
if [ -z "$MEETINGS_DB" ]; then echo "ERROR: meetings DB not found"; exit 1; fi
MEETING_ID=$(sqlite3 "$MEETINGS_DB" "SELECT id FROM meetings WHERE status='recording' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1")
if [ -z "$MEETING_ID" ]; then
  echo "ERROR: No meeting with status=recording found"
  exit 1
fi
echo "$MEETING_ID" > data/current_meeting.txt
mkdir -p data/recordings
AUDIO_FILE="data/recordings/${MEETING_ID}.wav"
rm -f data/stop_signal
echo "Recording meeting: $MEETING_ID -> $AUDIO_FILE"

# Read selected audio device from DB
DEVICE_INDEX=$(sqlite3 "$MEETINGS_DB" "SELECT selected_device_index FROM audio_settings WHERE id=1" 2>/dev/null)
DEVICE_NAME=$(sqlite3 "$MEETINGS_DB" "SELECT selected_device_name FROM audio_settings WHERE id=1" 2>/dev/null)

if [ -n "$DEVICE_INDEX" ] && [ "$DEVICE_INDEX" -ge 0 ] 2>/dev/null; then
  echo "Using audio device [$DEVICE_INDEX]: $DEVICE_NAME (ffmpeg)"
  # Record with ffmpeg using selected device — runs until stop signal
  /opt/homebrew/bin/ffmpeg -f avfoundation -i ":${DEVICE_INDEX}" -acodec pcm_s16le -ar 16000 -ac 1 "$AUDIO_FILE" &
  FFMPEG_PID=$!
  echo "ffmpeg started (PID: $FFMPEG_PID)"
  # Wait for stop signal
  while [ ! -f data/stop_signal ]; do sleep 0.5; done
  echo "Stop signal received, stopping ffmpeg..."
  kill -INT $FFMPEG_PID 2>/dev/null
  wait $FFMPEG_PID 2>/dev/null
else
  echo "No device selected, using system recorder binary"
  ./recorder "$AUDIO_FILE" data/stop_signal
fi

FILE_SIZE=$(stat -f%z "$AUDIO_FILE" 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
echo "Recording file size: $FILE_SIZE bytes"
if [ "$FILE_SIZE" -gt 1000 ]; then
  AUDIO_PATH="$(pwd)/$AUDIO_FILE"
  sqlite3 "$MEETINGS_DB" "UPDATE meetings SET status='recorded', audio_path='$AUDIO_PATH', updated_at=strftime('%s','now') WHERE id='$MEETING_ID'"
  echo "Meeting $MEETING_ID status updated to recorded"
else
  sqlite3 "$MEETINGS_DB" "UPDATE meetings SET status='failed', updated_at=strftime('%s','now') WHERE id='$MEETING_ID'"
  echo "ERROR: Recording failed - empty file"
  exit 1
fi
